_note: Label Sprint round for female-repro — generated female-repro_illus.webp, cropped/keyed dark mode.
alt: Human female reproductive system, sagittal section
caption: Tap each label, then tap where it belongs on the female reproductive system.

hotspots.label: Ovary
hotspots.detail: Produces ova (eggs) and secretes oestrogen and progesterone.

hotspots.label: Fallopian tube (oviduct)
hotspots.detail: Fringed, funnel-shaped tube that sweeps up the released ovum; site of fertilisation.

hotspots.label: Uterus
hotspots.detail: Muscular, pear-shaped organ where the fertilised egg implants and the fetus develops.

hotspots.label: Cervix
hotspots.detail: The narrow lower end of the uterus, opening into the vagina.

hotspots.label: Vagina
hotspots.detail: The muscular canal leading from the cervix to outside the body.

hotspots.label: Urinary bladder
hotspots.detail: Lies in front of the uterus; stores urine.

hotspots.label: Rectum
hotspots.detail: Lies behind the uterus, in front of the sacrum.

generation_prompt: human female reproductive anatomy, mid-sagittal cross-section
